title: 激昂、そして心は張り裂けて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after I fail to scout Gold City, I'm walking along under the
trees, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: So, that big fuss out on the course—that was City, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I think the guy she was arguing with was her trainer? Seemed pretty
heated. Wonder if she's okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't like the sound of that. I'd better go take a look!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Then, what? You're saying I should just stop training?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
No, no, not at all. It's just, you don't want to put on too much muscle
and ruin your proportions, or get any nasty scratches on your body!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Form is what you should be working on. Looking pretty while you run
is the name of the game for you. Oh, that and winning concert
practice!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay, so, is any of that gonna help me run faster? Help me win?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's what you're worried about? It'll be fine. I'll handle it. The trick is, you just gotta run in races you know you can win.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Then there won't be a scratch on your reputation! The glamorous, the
victorious Gold City—star of the show! The perfect plan, am I right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No... No, no, no! That's not who I want to be!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tell me... Why?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You said... you'd make me the top Umamusume. That I'd be the
brightest star on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So why? ...Why are you giving me this crap?!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: What? No, no, my stance hasn't changed. I mean c'mon, you're the Gold City.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Everyone talks about you—the cool and fierce model!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You'll be great. Just leave it all to me! How to present you, how to
make you shine—I've got it all figured out.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You just have to do what I say! It's for your own good. I mean, that's
what a trainer's for, isn't it?
choice_data_list: That's not what a real trainer does!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-you again... Why are you...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
And who do you think you are? Why don't you mind your own
business, huh?
choice_data_list: A real trainer listens to their trainee!
A real trainer listens to their trainee!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? You got some nerve, pal!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! ...Kid doesn't know what's good for her. I coulda made her a
star.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Dodged a bullet with that temper, though. Oh well, plenty of fish in
the sea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I need to make sure she's all right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My search takes me all across campus to no avail. There's only one
place I haven't looked...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uwaaah! What, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You scared me... Seriously, what's going on? You the paparazzi or
something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain the predicament and ask if she knows where Gold City could
be.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sooo, you feel the need to find her, why? ...Kinda sus.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know you're trying to scout her, but like, you're just after her looks,
aren't you? I mean, I get it—she's drop dead gorgeous.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But that means you're like, not any different from her manager, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So lemme ask you. Why do care about her?
choice_data_list: She's a hard worker, and I want to support her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Support her, huh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So like, you're gonna do what, exactly, for her?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You got nothing?! Wait, like actually? Not a good look.
choice_data_list: I mean, I barely know anything about her... yet.
I mean, I barely know anything about her... yet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list: I want to talk to her, and get to know her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only then can I decide what to do—her input is just as important as
mine.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... Well, you do you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, why's it feel like you're waiting for me to say something? Can
you not?
choice_data_list: Please, tell me where she is!
Please, tell me where she is!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa there, don't creep any closer! Nope, not doing this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, again? You've got to be joking!
choice_data_list: Please! You have to tell me!
Please! You have to tell me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No! Just, no! And stay away!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Phew. Should be safe he—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How are you still following me?! Just get lost already!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Stop! Ugh, I can't with you! Why are you asking me, anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I literally have no idea where she could be. I mean, the riverbank, I
guess, but—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, shoot.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a sec!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell her you found out from me, okay? Seriously, you better not
tell! She's legit scary when she's mad!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Are you listening?!
